### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages](Hexalith.EventStore.Contracts.Messages.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Contracts\.Messages')

## KebabConverter Class

Converts PascalCase strings to kebab\-case\. Internal helper for MessageType assembly\.
Unlike NamingConventionEngine, this does NOT strip suffixes — raw type name conversion only\.

```csharp
internal static class KebabConverter
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; KebabConverter

## KebabConverter\.WordBoundaryRegex\(\) Method

```csharp
private static System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex WordBoundaryRegex();
```

#### Returns
[System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.text.regularexpressions.regex 'System\.Text\.RegularExpressions\.Regex')

### Remarks
Pattern:<br/>

```csharp
(?<=[a-z0-9])([A-Z])|(?<=[A-Z])([A-Z][a-z])|(?<=[a-zA-Z])([0-9])
```<br/>
Explanation:<br/>

```csharp
○ Match with 3 alternative expressions, atomically.<br/>
    ○ Match a sequence of expressions.<br/>
        ○ Zero-width positive lookbehind.<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [0-9a-z] right-to-left.<br/>
        ○ 1st capture group.<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].<br/>
    ○ Match a sequence of expressions.<br/>
        ○ Zero-width positive lookbehind.<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [A-Z] right-to-left.<br/>
        ○ 2nd capture group.<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [A-Z].<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [a-z].<br/>
    ○ Match a sequence of expressions.<br/>
        ○ Zero-width positive lookbehind.<br/>
            ○ Match an ASCII letter right-to-left.<br/>
        ○ 3rd capture group.<br/>
            ○ Match a character in the set [0-9].<br/>
```
